prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-STRETCHLAMP-200L Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 3 in 1 Head Lamp 1.5 Watt COB Bulb 200 Lumen LED Description: Have you ever found yourself in a situation where you just didn't have enough light? You can avoid this by adding one crucial piece of equipment to your outdoor and emergency gear - the ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Head Lamp. Headlamps (also known as headlights and head torches) are a light source affixed to the head for outdoor activities, at night or in dark conditions such as caving, hiking, skiing, backpacking, and camping, but can also come in handy at home, too. Never get caught under the sink, in your dark basement or in a crawlspace again without adequate lighting with the ASR Outdoor Head Lamp.

Our headlamp is powered by 3 AAA batteries (not included) and comes with an adjustable elastic head strap so you can easily attach the lamp to your head or helmet. It features a 3 in 1 COB & LED light that will 50% brightness, 100% brightness or a flashing light with the press of a 3 stage switch button. These different light functions give you the option to utilize the best light for whatever situation you find yourself in.

The 200 Lumen light will ensure a super bright lighting experience and can provide extra visibility for an added safety measure. The lamp itself is constructed of durable and lightweight plastic that is water-resistant, so you can use it in inclement weather.

Whether you're camping with friends or family, biking at night or fixing a plumbing issue in a dark area of your house, the ASR Outdoor 3 Function Head Lamp will help keep you safe and visible in dark conditions and provide hands-free light so you can get the job done. Make sure to grab a few of these to keep in your outdoor, home improvement and emergency gear. Search Terms: head lamp led with red light option 200 lumen water proof camping kids waterproof Features: - 3 IN 1 HEAD LAMP - ASR Outdoor Head Lamp with 50% Brightness, 100% Brightness and Safety Flashing Light Functions | 3 Stage Switch Button Easily Cycles Through Options - ADJUSTABLE HEAD STRAP - Comes with Black Elastic Head Strap | One Size Fits Most | Attach to Head or Helmet for Hands-free Light - BATTERY POWERED - Requires 3 AAA Batteries (Not Included) | Super Bright 200 Lumen COB LED Light Provides Added Visibility and Safety - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of High-quality Water-resistant Plastic | Ideal for Outdoor and Nighttime Activities, Camping, Hiking, Home Improvement, Repairs and More - COMPACT DESIGN - Light with Band Weighs Just .08 Pounds (1.28 Ounces) | Won't Take Up Too Much Space, Easy to Pack for Travel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Head Lamp 200 Lumen LED Flashlight
